headline: RBC Keeps Outperform on Union Pacific (UNP), Flags Higher Q1 EPS and Approval Risk
summary: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio for Income: 15 Stocks to Invest In. On March 26, RBC Capital Markets lowered its price recommendation on Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) to $273 from $280. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The update came as part of a broader research note […]
